caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed on it, along with a green cap and headphones. The man is engaged in a conversation or interview, speaking into a microphone held by someone off-camera. The setting includes framed photographs on the wall, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion, possibly for a podcast or an informal talk show, as indicated by the "BOSS TALK 101" logo visible in the corner of the screen.
